ses.receiptrule.stopaction.Scope.Docs: The scope of the StopAction. The only acceptable value is `RuleSet`.

ses.receiptrule.stopaction.TopicArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon SNS topic to notify when the stop action is taken. You can find the ARN of a topic by using the [ListTopics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sns/latest/api/API_ListTopics.html) Amazon SNS operation.  For more information about Amazon SNS topics, see the [Amazon SNS Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sns/latest/dg/CreateTopic.html).
